name: Fruit Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, salt, and baking powder together.
2. Cut in shortening until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add milk to form a soft dough.
4. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface.
5. Pat into an 8-inch square rectangle about 1/2 inch thick.
6. Lightly knead the dough.
7. Spread half of the dough with melted butter, sugar, cinnamon, and raisins.
8. Fold the dough over itself.
9. Cut into squares or rectangles using a floured knife or cutter.
10. Place on an un-oiled baking sheet.
11. Bake in a hot oven (450°F) for about 10 minutes.
6 servings.
